name: Lang Ops: Modern Greek (intro to learn language)
short_description: The road to efficiency leads through repetition. Lang Ops allows you to get accustomed to Greek language at your own pace! Features a lot of different tests to guarantee success!
detailed_description:
You've just arrived at a place designated on your GPS.

"A house in the middle of the forest. Great!" - you say to yourself - "What could go wrong?"

You are part of a special operations team and "there's nothing to be scared of"!

The reason why you're here is to get prepared for incoming missions in Greece.

"There's a lot to learn and more to come" - he says - "And I cannot risk sending you to a mission inexperienced"

Personally, I prefer quick and condensed exercises for basics. Fret not though! Most of the tests, that are prepared, have different levels of difficulty and pace!

Game focuses mainly on:

  • learning the alphabet

  • vocabulary

Game contains:

regarding Greek alphabet

  • 4 different types of tests

  • more than 1000 variations of those tests in total

regarding vocabulary

  • more than 10 subjects

  • over 250 words to learn

  • help that tracks your progress

Features support working with Roman alphabet to Greek alphabet and vice versa.

Aspects that are not available or appear only as mentions:

  • accents, speaking, pronunciation

  • writing

  • grammar
